_comment: Casualty triage protocol for incident_type=casualty_triage. SORTING ONLY - this file directs how trained responders categorize casualties under START/SALT; it contains no diagnosis and no treatment steps, by design (CLAUDE.md hard rule 3). Paraphrased from the public START and SALT mass-casualty triage schemes. Loaded by matcher.py at startup; keywords drive the forgiving fallback match on needs/notes.
title: Mass-casualty triage - START / SALT sorting

guidance.action: Announce that everyone who can walk should move to the marked MINOR (green) collection area.
guidance.rationale: The global sort instantly separates the least urgent group and shrinks the pool needing individual assessment.

guidance.action: Ask those remaining to wave or make a purposeful movement; assess the still, silent casualties first.
guidance.rationale: Non-responders are statistically the most urgent, so they go to the front of the assessment line when responders are few.

guidance.action: Assess each remaining casualty on respirations, perfusion, and mental status (RPM): breathing present and rate, radial pulse or capillary refill, and ability to follow simple commands.
guidance.rationale: Three fast, objective checks let different responders sort the same casualty to the same category.

guidance.action: Tag every casualty with a category: IMMEDIATE (red) for life-threatening findings, DELAYED (yellow) for serious but able to wait, MINOR (green) for the walking wounded.
guidance.rationale: Visible category tags let transport and care be allocated by survival benefit instead of arrival order.

guidance.action: Assign EXPECTANT for casualties whose injuries are not survivable with the resources actually on hand, and revisit that assignment whenever capacity changes.
guidance.rationale: An explicit expectant category preserves scarce capacity for salvageable casualties and is deliberately reversible.

guidance.action: Re-triage continuously and report the running category counts (red / yellow / green / expectant) to the command post.
guidance.rationale: Casualties deteriorate and resources arrive; a single triage pass under-serves a changing scene, and counts drive transport priority.

safety_flags: Sorting only - this service does not direct any treatment
Re-triage as conditions or resources change; categories are not final
Do not enter an unsecured scene to reach casualties
